name: dev.cz-agents/adis
description: ADIS — Czech VAT-payer reliability check (nespolehlivý plátce DPH) via official MFČR SOAP service. Status meanings NE/ANO/NENALEZEN, transparent bank accounts under § 96a ZDPH, joint-liability protection under § 109 ZDPH. DIČ lookup, VAT compliance, Czech tax due diligence ready.
